productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Perforations on the forefoot and designed overlays on the backfoot for enhanced breathability and style Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with a raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
